chunks.title: Oracle on Jerusalem's Fall and Joy
chunks.reason: Describes the invasion of Jerusalem, the people's panic, their reliance on human defenses, and their foolish celebration before judgment.

chunks.title: Judgment on Shebna and Appointment of Eliakim
chunks.reason: Contains a direct address to the steward Shebna regarding his tomb, followed by the transfer of authority to Eliakim and its eventual failure.
